column2: Pepys wrote Newton to ask which of three events is more likely: that a person get (a) at least 1 six when 6 dice are rolled, (b) at least 2 sixes when 12 dice are rolled, or (c) at least 3 sixes when 18dice are rolled. What is the answer?
column3: Rolling 6 dice will do better than 12 or 18
column4: Rolling 12 dice will do better than 6 or 18
column5: Rolling 18dice will do better than 6 or 12

column2: Players A and B match pennies N times. They keep a tally of their gains and losses. After the first loss, what is the chance that at no time during the game will they be even?

A power shift crawler tractor has a rated blade capacity of 7.65LCM. The dozer is excavating loose common earth and pushing it a distance of 61m. Maximum reversed speed in third range is 8kph. Estimate the production of the dozer if job efficiency is 50min/hr.

The interior of a satellite TV antenna is a dish having a shape of a finite paraboloid that has a diameter 12 meters and is 2 meter deep. Find the distance from the center if the dish to the focus.

A person driving her car at 45 kph approaches an intersection just as the traffic light turns yellow. She knows that the yellow light lasts only 2.0 sec before turning red and she is 28 m from the near side of the intersection. Should she try to stop, or she speed up to cross the intersection before the light turns red? The intersection is 15 m wide. Her car’s maximum deceleration is -5.8 m/s2, whereas it can accelerate from 45 kph to 65 kph in 6.0 sec. Ignore the length of her car and her reaction time.
column3: She should speed up to cross the intersection before the light turns red.
column4: She should adjust the rate of deceleration and wait for the next red light
column5: She should maintain the rate of deceleration and continue as she would pass through the intersection against the green light.
column6: She should adjust the rate of deceleration, stop and wait for the next green light.

column2: A 2 kg body is tied to the end of chord and whirled in a horizontal circle of radius 1.5 m at 3 revolution per second. Neglecting the attraction due to gravity, find the acceleration of the body toward the center of the circle in m/s2.

The machine was purchased at an original cost of P400,000 with a salvage value of P20,000. The life of this machine is expected to last 6 years. It was used for 4000 hours in the first year, 6000 hours in the second year, and 8000 hours on the third year. The machine is expected to last for 38000 hours in a period of 6 years. Which of the following gives the depreciation at the end of the second year?

A printing machine costs P400,000 to purchase with a life of 10 years with no salvage value. If the rate of interest is 10% per annum, compounded annually, compute the equivalent uniform annual cost of the machine if it will cost P100,000 per year to operate?

new corporate bond is being offered in the market for $930. The bond has a face value of $1000 and matures in 10 years. The issuing corporation promises to pay $70 in interest every year. What is the company’s cost of the capital raised through this bond issue if the stock broker’s fee is $15 per bond sold?

A man bought a government bond which cost P1M and will pay P50,000 interest each year for 20 years. The bond will mature at the end of 20 years, and he will receive the original P1M. If there is 2% annual inflation during this period, what rate of return will the investor receive after considering the effect of inflation?

A proposed manufacturing plant will require a fixed capital investment if P8M and estimated working capital of P1.5M. The annual profit is P2M and the annual depreciation is to be 8% of the fixed capital investment. Compute the rate of return of the total investment.

Assuming the smoke and the two stations are on the same vertical plane, find the height of the smoke.
